name: 사내에서는 정숙할 것
title: 사내에서는 정숙할 것
overview_en: Nayul was at her breaking point Between the crushing workload and her detestable boss Kwon Sijin a man who perfected the art of trampling on dignity she d had enough At 11 PM on a Friday driven by pure rage she stormed into his office There time froze Nayul stood paralyzed having caught her perfect yet perverted boss in the middle of a private lewd act during overtime

name: &TEAM COURSE
title: TEAM COURSE
overview_en: A full course meal of TEAMS charms

overview: تدور القصة حول المدّعي العام بانغ تاي سوب الذي يقفز إلى عالم تحالفات النفوذ والسلطة في سعيه للوصول إلى قمة النخبة في كوريا وسط لعبة بقاء شرسة بين جميع من يحيطون به يصبح تاي سوب مدّعيًا عامًا نجمًا بين ليلة وضحاها بعد زواجه من أشهر ممثلات كوريا زوجته تشو سانغ آ التي كانت يومًا نجمة البلاد الأولى
name: الذروة
title: الذروة
overview_en: An ambitious prosecutor rises through Korea s elite by marrying a famous actress only to be pulled into a ruthless power cartel where hidden informants corporate heirs and political players collide in a brutal struggle for survival and control
